title: GN5-1 Passkeys Use and Deployment for R&E Services
author: Marovic, Branko
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Passkeys are a more secure and convenient alternative to passwords, which they aim to replace as the primary method for account authentication. This white paper describes how they work; their usage; key aspects of their implementation, in particular for R&E services; and next steps with regard to development, transition and adoption.
